# @devalok/shilp-sutra-karm

> Domain-specific UI components for the Karm team-management platform.
> Built on top of @devalok/shilp-sutra (core design system).
> Peer dependency: @devalok/shilp-sutra >=0.3.0

## Install & Import

pnpm add @devalok/shilp-sutra-karm

// Per-module imports (recommended):
import { KanbanBoard } from '@devalok/shilp-sutra-karm/board'
import { TaskPanel, TaskColumnPicker, SubtasksTab } from '@devalok/shilp-sutra-karm/tasks'
import { ChatPanel } from '@devalok/shilp-sutra-karm/chat'
import { AttendanceCTA, DailyBrief } from '@devalok/shilp-sutra-karm/dashboard'
import { AccentProvider, ClientPortalHeader, ProjectCard } from '@devalok/shilp-sutra-karm/client'
import { AdminDashboard, BreakAdmin } from '@devalok/shilp-sutra-karm/admin'

// Or from root barrel:
import { KanbanBoard, TaskPanel, ChatPanel } from '@devalok/shilp-sutra-karm'

## Module Reference

### Board (`/board`)
- KanbanBoard: initialData(BoardData), members?(BoardMember[]), onTaskMove, onTaskAdd, onColumnRename, onColumnDelete, onColumnToggleVisibility, onClickTask, onAddColumn
- BoardColumn: column(BoardColumnData), index, onAddTask, onClickTask, onRenameColumn, onDeleteColumn
- TaskCard: task(BoardTask), onClickTask
- TaskCardOverlay: task(BoardTask) â€” drag overlay variant

BoardTask shape: { id, title, priority, labels[], dueDate, isBlocked, assignees[] }
BoardData shape: { columns: [{ id, name, isClientVisible, tasks[] }] }
Constants: COLUMN_WIDTH(320), COLUMN_ACCENT_COLORS(8 category bg colors), PRIORITY_ICONS({ LOW: 'IconArrowDown', MEDIUM: 'IconArrowRight', HIGH: 'IconArrowUp', URGENT: 'IconAlertTriangle' }), PRIORITY_COLORS({ LOW: 'text-text-tertiary', MEDIUM: 'text-warning', HIGH: 'text-error', URGENT: 'text-error' }), DEFAULT_FILTERS({ search: '', assignees: [], priorities: [], labels: [], dueDateRange: null })

Uses dnd-kit for drag-and-drop. KanbanBoard manages all DnD state internally.
Pass `members` prop for explicit member list in assignment dropdowns â€” required for new/empty projects with no task assignees yet. Falls back to deriving members from task data when omitted.

Column management callbacks: `onColumnRename`, `onColumnDelete`, `onColumnToggleVisibility`, and `onAddColumn`
are fire-and-forget â€” the board renders an "Add column" button and column header menus only when the
corresponding callbacks are provided. The consumer must build their own confirmation UI (e.g., ConfirmDialog)
and state updates. Example wiring a custom column header action:

  <KanbanBoard
    initialData={boardData}
    onColumnRename={(columnId, name) => updateColumn(columnId, { name })}
    onColumnDelete={(columnId) => {
      setColumnToDelete(columnId)   // open your own ConfirmDialog
    }}
    onColumnToggleVisibility={(columnId, visible) => updateColumn(columnId, { isClientVisible: visible })}
    onAddColumn={() => setShowNewColumnDialog(true)}
  />

### Tasks (`/tasks`)

**TaskPanel (v2 composition API â€” recommended)**
Headless compound component. Shell subcomponents:
- TaskPanel (root): children, className â€” flex column container
- TaskPanel.Header: children, className â€” top section with border
- TaskPanel.Title: value, editable?, onUpdate?, subtask?, className â€” inline-editable heading
- TaskPanel.Properties: children, className â€” property rows container
- TaskPanel.Property: icon, label, children, className â€” single property row (120px label + flex value)
- TaskPanel.Tabs: defaultTab, onTabChange?, children â€” tab system (children must be TaskPanel.Tab)
- TaskPanel.Tab: id, label, icon?, children â€” declarative tab definition
- TaskPanel.Loading: className â€” skeleton placeholder

**Pickers (7)** â€” all support readOnly?, className?, forwardRef
- TaskColumnPicker: columns[], value(string), onChange(id)
- TaskPriorityPicker: value(Priority), onChange(priority)
- TaskMemberPicker: members[], value(string|null), onChange(id|null), placeholder?
- TaskAssigneePicker: members[], value(Member[]), onAssign(id), onUnassign(id)
- TaskDatePicker: value(Date|string|null), onChange(date|null), presets?(default:true)
- TaskLabelEditor: value(string[]), onChange(labels), availableLabels?(LabelOption[])
- TaskVisibilityPicker: value(Visibility), onChange(v), confirmOnPublic?

**Tab Pieces (16)** â€” for custom tab layouts
Subtasks: SubtaskProgress(completed,total), SubtaskList(children), SubtaskItem(subtask,isComplete,onToggle?,onClick?), SubtaskAddForm(onCreate)
Conversation: MessageList(children,autoScroll?), MessageBubble(comment,clientMode?,renderViewer?), MessageInput(onSubmit,renderEditor?,clientMode?), VisibilityWarning
Files: FileDropZone(onUpload,isUploading?,accept?), FileList(children), FileItem(file,onDelete?,readOnly?)
Review: ReviewCard(review,onUpdateStatus?), ReviewResponseForm(reviewId,onSubmit), ReviewRequestButton(members,onRequest)
Activity: ActivityTimeline(children), ActivityEntry(entry)

**Pre-assembled tabs** (unchanged from v0.18.0, usable inside TaskPanel.Tab):
- SubtasksTab, ConversationTab, FilesTab, ReviewTab, ActivityTab

**TaskDetailPanel (deprecated)** â€” monolithic v0.18.0 component, still exported. Migrate to TaskPanel.
- TaskDetailPanel: task(FullTask|null), open, onOpenChange, columns[], members[], activities[], clientMode?, onTitleUpdate, onPropertyUpdate, onAssign, onUnassign, onCreateSubtask, onToggleSubtask, onRequestReview, onUpdateReviewStatus + more callbacks
- TaskProperties: task, columns[], members[], onUpdate, onAssign, onUnassign, readOnly?, editableFields?, renderPriorityIndicator?, renderDatePicker?

Shared types: Priority, Visibility, CommentAuthorType, LabelOption, Member, Column, Subtask, ReviewRequest, Comment, TaskFile, AuditLogEntry
Priority values: 'LOW' | 'MEDIUM' | 'HIGH' | 'URGENT'
Visibility: 'INTERNAL' | 'EVERYONE'

### Chat (`/chat`)
- ChatPanel: isOpen, onOpenChange, messages[], conversations[], agents?[], selectedAgentId?, isStreaming?, streamingText?, onSendMessage, onCancelStream?, onSelectAgent?, onStartNewChat?, onSelectConversation?, onArchiveConversation?, onDeleteConversation?
- ChatInput: onSubmit, onCancel?, isStreaming?, placeholder?, disclaimer?
- MessageList: messages[], isStreaming?, streamingText?, isLoadingMessages?
- ConversationList: conversations[], activeConversationId?, onSelect, onNewChat, onArchive?, onDelete?
- StreamingText: text(string) â€” markdown renderer with animated cursor

ChatMessage shape: { id, role: 'USER'|'ASSISTANT'|'SYSTEM', content }
Agent shape: { id, name, desc }
Conversation shape: { id, title, updatedAt }

### Dashboard (`/dashboard`)
- AttendanceCTA: userName, attendance, canMarkAttendance, onMarkAttendance?, isSubmitting?, formatTime?
- DailyBrief: data({ brief: string[], generatedAt }|null), loading?, onRefresh?, unavailable?, defaultCollapsed?, title?
- ScratchpadWidget: items(ScratchpadItem[]), onToggle, onAdd?, onDelete?, loading?, title?
- SidebarScratchpad: items(ScratchpadItem[]), onToggle, defaultOpen?, badgeCount?

ScratchpadItem shape: { id, text, done }

### Client Portal (`/client`)
- AccentProvider: accentCss?(string) â€” injects CSS custom properties on document root
- ClientPortalHeader: orgName, orgLogo?, userName, userAvatar?
- ProjectCard: name, description?, status('active'|'completed'|'paused'), taskCount?, completedTasks?

### Admin (`/admin`)
AdminDashboard and BreakAdmin are COMPOUND components with sub-components accessed via dot notation.

AdminDashboard compound:
  <AdminDashboard.Root currentUserId={...} currentUserRole={...} assetsBaseUrl={...} userImages={...}>
    <AdminDashboard.Calendar dateAttendanceMap={...} />
    <AdminDashboard.AttendanceOverview groupedAttendance={...} users={...} />
    <AdminDashboard.LeaveRequests requests={...} corrections={...} />
    <AdminDashboard.AssociateDetail attendance={...} tasks={...} corrections={...} />
  </AdminDashboard.Root>

BreakAdmin compound:
  <BreakAdmin.Root currentUser={...} breaks={...} users={...} breakBalanceData={...} userImages={...} onApproveRequest={...} onRejectRequest={...} ...>
    <BreakAdmin.Header />
    <BreakAdmin.Breaks />
    <BreakAdmin.LeaveRequest />
    <BreakAdmin.BreakBalance />
    <BreakAdmin.EditBreak />
    <BreakAdmin.EditBreakBalance />
    <BreakAdmin.DeleteBreak />
    <BreakAdmin.ApprovedAdjustments />
  </BreakAdmin.Root>

UserRole: 'Apprentice' | 'Associate' | 'Admin' | 'SuperAdmin'
AttendanceStatus: 'PRESENT' | 'ABSENT' | 'BREAK' | 'Not_Marked' | 'HOLIDAY' | 'WEEKEND'
BreakRequestStatus: 'PENDING' | 'APPROVED' | 'REJECTED' | 'CANCELLED'

### Utility Exports
- Date formatting: formatDate, formatDateIST, formatTimeIST, formatDateWithWeekday, formatOptionalDate
- Date helpers: getDaySuffix, isSameDay, getWeekDays, getMonthDays, getStartOfDay, getEndOfDay
- String helpers: removeAllEmojis, removeEmojiAtStart
- Rendering: renderAdjustmentType, renderStatus

### Loading Skeletons
- DevsabhaSkeleton, BandwidthSkeleton â€” domain-specific page skeletons

## Key Patterns

- All components are callback-driven (emit updates via on* props, no internal state management)
- Admin components use compound pattern with React Context (AdminDashboard.Root provides context to children)
- Client mode: All pickers support readOnly. TaskDetailPanel (deprecated), TaskProperties, FilesTab support readOnly + editableFields for client portal. With TaskPanel v2, control client mode by choosing which pickers/tabs to render.
- Chat supports streaming: pass isStreaming + streamingText for live AI responses
- Board uses dnd-kit: KanbanBoard handles all drag state, emits onTaskMove with final position
- All dates default to IST (Asia/Kolkata) timezone in admin utilities

## Common Mistakes -- DO NOT

- DO NOT manage DnD state outside KanbanBoard â€” it handles sensors, collision detection, and sorting internally
- DO NOT use TaskDetailPanel for new code â€” use TaskPanel composition API instead
- DO NOT forget to pass both open AND onOpenChange to TaskDetailPanel if still using the deprecated API (it's a controlled Sheet)
- DO NOT use TaskPanel.Tab outside TaskPanel.Tabs â€” Tabs extracts props from Tab children
- DO NOT use AdminDashboard sub-components outside AdminDashboard.Root â€” they depend on context
- DO NOT use BreakAdmin sub-components outside BreakAdmin.Root â€” same compound pattern
- DO NOT pass raw Date objects for task dates â€” use ISO strings (the components parse them internally)
- DO NOT forget the peer dependency: @devalok/shilp-sutra must be installed for UI primitives
